query:
SELECT
            gm.id AS msg_id,
            gm.group_id,
            gm.from_uid,
            u.username AS from_name,
            gm.content,
            gm.msg_type,
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM gm.created_at)::bigint * 1000 AS "send_time!"
        FROM im_group_messages gm
        JOIN im_users u ON u.id = gm.from_uid
        WHERE gm.group_id = $1
          AND gm.id < COALESCE($2::bigint, 9223372036854775807)
        ORDER BY gm.id DESC
        LIMIT $3
